de.title: WooCommerce Checkout-Felder anpassen: weniger ist mehr Conversion
de.description: Wie du WooCommerce Checkout-Felder optimierst: welche Felder du weglassen kannst, welche Pflicht sind, wie eigene Felder in Bestellung und E-Mail landen — und warum ein schlankes Checkout-Formular mehr verkauft.
de.excerpt: Zu viele Checkout-Felder kosten Conversions. Welche WooCommerce-Felder du sicher entfernen kannst, welche du brauchst — und wie eigene Felder sauber in Bestellung und E-Mail landen.

en.title: Customising WooCommerce checkout fields: fewer fields, more conversions
en.description: How to optimise your WooCommerce checkout fields: which ones you can safely remove, which ones are essential, how custom field values flow into orders and emails — and why a lean checkout form sells more.
en.excerpt: Too many checkout fields cost you conversions. Which WooCommerce fields you can safely remove, which you need to keep — and how custom fields flow cleanly into orders and notification emails.
